word: H3296 - יַעֲרֵי אֹרְגִים - Yaʻărêy ʼÔrᵉgîym - yah-ar-ay' o-reg-eem' - Jaare-oregim

sections.paragraph:
Original: יערי ארגים

Transliteration: ya‛ărêy 'ôregı̂ym

Phonetic: yah-ar-ay' o-reg-eem'

BDB Definition:

Jaare-oregim = "forests of weaver"
  1. a man of Bethlehem, father of Elhanan the giant slayer and one of David's mighty warriors; also called 'Jair'

Origin: from the pl. of H3293 and the masc. pl. act. participle of H707

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
